_info: PharSayo Philippines GTIN list (curated). Add keys as digits-only barcodes. Not an official FDA register — expand for your deployment.

4807788561688.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer (Analgesic/Antipyretic). Used for headache, fever, and minor body aches.
4807788561688.purpose_fil: Gamot para sa lagnat at sakit ng katawan (Analgesic/Antipyretic). Ginagamit para sa sakit ng ulo, lagnat, at kirot.
4807788561688.precautions_en: Do not take more than 4,000mg in 24 hours. Avoid alcohol. Consult a doctor if you have liver disease.
4807788561688.precautions_fil: Huwag uminom ng higit sa 4,000mg sa loob ng 24 oras. Iwasan ang alak. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may sakit sa atay.
4807788561688.frequency_hint: Every 4 to 6 hours as needed, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788560520.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer. For headache, toothache, muscular aches, and fever.
4807788560520.purpose_fil: Pampalubag ng sakit at lagnat. Para sa sakit ng ulo, ngipin, kalamnan, at lagnat.
4807788560520.precautions_en: Do not exceed 4,000mg in 24 hours. Do not use with other paracetamol-containing products.
4807788560520.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa 4,000mg sa loob ng 24 oras. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng ibang produktong may paracetamol.
4807788560520.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 caplets every 4 to 6 hours as needed.

4807788560650.purpose_en: Relieves clogged nose, headache, and fever without causing drowsiness.
4807788560650.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng baradong ilong at lagnat nang hindi nakakaantok.
4807788560650.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Ask a doctor if you have heart problems or hypertension.
4807788560650.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa tamang dosis. Magtanong sa doktor kung may sakit sa puso o mataas na presyon.
4807788560650.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 6 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788560667.purpose_en: Relieves nasal congestion, runny nose, sneezing, headache, and fever due to common cold.
4807788560667.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng baradong ilong, sipon, pagbabahing, sakit ng ulo, at lagnat dahil sa sipon.
4807788560667.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness. Do not drive after taking. Avoid alcohol.
4807788560667.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng antok. Huwag magmaneho pagkatapos uminom. Iwasan ang alak.

4807788561145.purpose_en: Mucolytic. Thins and loosens phlegm to make it easier to cough out.
4807788561145.purpose_fil: Mucolytic. Nagpapalabnaw at nagpapaluwag ng plema para mas madaling mailabas sa pag-ubo.
4807788561145.precautions_en: Do not use if you have an active stomach ulcer. Consult a doctor if pregnant or breastfeeding.
4807788561145.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung may aktibong ulcer sa sikmura. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung buntis o nagpapasuso.
4807788561145.frequency_hint: 1 capsule every 8 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788561619.purpose_en: Relieves flu-like symptoms including fever, body aches, headache, and clogged nose.
4807788561619.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sintomas ng trangkaso gaya ng lagnat, sakit ng katawan, sakit ng ulo, at baradong ilong.
4807788561619.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness. Avoid alcohol. Consult a doctor if you have heart or liver problems.
4807788561619.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng pagkaantok. Iwasan ang alak. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa puso o atay.
4807788561619.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 6 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788561596.purpose_en: Relieves flu symptoms: fever, headache, body aches, and nasal congestion.
4807788561596.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng trangkaso: lagnat, sakit ng ulo, pananakit ng katawan, at baradong ilong.
4807788561596.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness. Consult a doctor if pregnant, breastfeeding, or has liver/heart condition.
4807788561596.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng antok. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung buntis, nagpapasuso, o may kondisyon sa atay/puso.

5290665007802.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer (NSAID). Used for headache, muscle pain, and minor aches.
5290665007802.purpose_fil: Gamot sa kirot at lagnat (NSAID). Ginagamit sa sakit ng ulo, kalamnan, at pananakit ng katawan.
5290665007802.precautions_en: Take after meals. Avoid if you have stomach ulcers. Consult a doctor if you have heart or kidney issues.
5290665007802.precautions_fil: Inumin pagkatapos kumain. Huwag gamitin kung may ulcer. Magtanong sa doktor kung may sakit sa puso o bato.
5290665007802.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 6 tablets in 24 hours.

4800016052061.purpose_en: NSAID. Relief of mild to moderate pain, including dental pain, post-operative pain, and menstrual pain.
4800016052061.purpose_fil: NSAID. Pampawala ng katamtamang sakit, gaya ng sakit sa ngipin, sakit pagkatapos ng operasyon, at dysmenorrhea.
4800016052061.precautions_en: Take with food. Do not use for more than 7 days. Avoid if you have asthma or stomach ulcers.
4800016052061.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Huwag gamitin ng mahigit sa 7 araw. Iwasan kung may hika o ulcer sa sikmura.
4800016052061.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 8 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016651172.purpose_en: Vitamin E supplement for healthy skin and antioxidant protection.
4800016651172.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin E para sa malusog na balat at proteksyon laban sa free radicals.
4800016651172.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if you have blood clotting issues or are taking blood thinners.
4800016651172.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa pamumuo ng dugo o umiinom ng pampalabnaw ng dugo.
4800016651172.frequency_hint: 1 capsule daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016604819.purpose_en: Vitamin and mineral supplement for children to boost immunity and prevent deficiencies.
4800016604819.purpose_fil: Supplement na bitamina at mineral para sa bata pampalakas ng resistensya.
4800016604819.precautions_en: Follow age-appropriate dosage on label. Consult a pediatrician.
4800016604819.precautions_fil: Sundin ang tamang dosis para sa edad na nasa label. Kumonsulta sa pediatrician.
4800016604819.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4806016351820.purpose_en: Vitamin C supplement to boost immunity and skin health.
4806016351820.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin C para sa resistensya at kalusugan ng balat.
4806016351820.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if you have kidney problems. High doses may cause diarrhea.
4806016351820.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may problema sa bato. Ang mataas na dosis ay maaaring magdulot ng pagtatae.
4806016351820.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016104210.precautions_en: Do not use if you have bloody stool or high fever. Avoid overdose. Max 8 capsules per day.
4800016104210.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung may dugo sa dumi o lagnat. Iwasan ang sobrang dosis. Max 8 kapsula bawat araw.
4800016104210.frequency_hint: 2 capsules initially, then 1 capsule after each loose stool. Max 8 caps per day.

4807788560056.purpose_en: Combination pain reliever for severe headache, body aches, toothache, and muscle pain.
4807788560056.purpose_fil: Kombinasyon ng pampawala ng sakit para sa matinding sakit ng ulo, katawan, ngipin, at kalamnan.
4807788560056.precautions_en: Take with food. Avoid alcohol. Do not use if you have kidney, heart, or stomach problems.
4807788560056.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Iwasan ang alak. Huwag gamitin kung may sakit sa bato, puso, o sikmura.
4807788560056.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours.

4807788560063.purpose_en: For fast relief of pain and fever. Effective for headache, muscle pain, and toothache.
4807788560063.purpose_fil: Para sa mabilis na pampawala ng sakit at lagnat. Epektibo sa sakit ng ulo, kalamnan, at ngipin.
4807788560063.precautions_en: Take with food or milk. Do not use more than 7 days unless directed by a doctor.
4807788560063.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain o gatas. Huwag gamitin ng higit sa 7 araw maliban kung iniutos ng doktor.

4800168201232.purpose_en: Fast-acting pain reliever and fever reducer (NSAID). For headache, dysmenorrhea, muscle pain, and fever.
4800168201232.purpose_fil: Mabilis na pampawala ng sakit at lagnat (NSAID). Para sa sakit ng ulo, dysmenorrhea, kalamnan, at lagnat.
4800168201232.precautions_en: Take with food. Do not use if you have peptic ulcer. Consult a doctor if you have asthma, kidney, or heart disease.
4800168201232.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Huwag gamitin kung may peptic ulcer. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may hika, sakit sa bato, o puso.
4800168201232.frequency_hint: 1 softgel every 6 to 8 hours as needed. Do not exceed 3 softgels in 24 hours.

4800168201249.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer (NSAID). For mild headache, body aches, and fever.
4800168201249.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sakit at lagnat (NSAID). Para sa banayad na sakit ng ulo, pananakit ng katawan, at lagnat.
4800168201249.precautions_en: Take with food. Avoid if you have stomach ulcer, kidney problems, or heart disease.
4800168201249.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Iwasan kung may ulcer sa sikmura, sakit sa bato, o sakit sa puso.
4800168201249.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 softgels every 4 to 6 hours as needed.

4809354001075.purpose_en: Pain reliever, fever reducer (NSAID). Effective for headaches, minor arthritis pain, muscular aches.
4809354001075.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sakit at lagnat (NSAID). Epektibo sa sakit ng ulo, banayad na arthritis, at pananakit ng kalamnan.
4809354001075.precautions_en: Take with food. Do not use if allergic to aspirin. Avoid if you have stomach ulcers.
4809354001075.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Huwag gamitin kung may allergy sa aspirin. Iwasan kung may ulcer.
4809354001075.frequency_hint: 1 tablet every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Max 3 tablets in 24 hours.

4807388000014.purpose_en: Relieves symptoms of common cold: nasal congestion, runny nose, sneezing, and headache.
4807388000014.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sintomas ng sipon: baradong ilong, sipon, pagbabahing, at sakit ng ulo.
4807388000014.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness and dizziness. Avoid driving. Do not use with MAO inhibitors.
4807388000014.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng pagkaantok at hilo. Iwasan ang pagmamaneho. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng MAO inhibitors.

4807388000021.purpose_en: Non-drowsy relief of nasal congestion, headache, and fever due to common cold.
4807388000021.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng baradong ilong, sakit ng ulo, at lagnat nang walang antok.
4807388000021.precautions_en: Avoid if you have high blood pressure or heart disease. Do not exceed recommended dose.
4807388000021.precautions_fil: Iwasan kung may mataas na presyon o sakit sa puso. Huwag lumampas sa inirekomendang dosis.

4807388000052.purpose_en: Cough and cold syrup / tablet. Relieves cough, nasal congestion, runny nose, and fever.
4807388000052.purpose_fil: Para sa ubo at sipon. Nagpapawala ng ubo, baradong ilong, sipon, at lagnat.
4807388000052.precautions_en: May cause drowsiness. Do not use with other cough/cold medicines without doctor's advice.
4807388000052.precautions_fil: Maaaring makaantok. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng ibang gamot sa ubo/sipon nang walang payo ng doktor.

4809003001119.dosage_hint: Aluminum Hydroxide 200mg + Magnesium Hydroxide 200mg + Simethicone 25mg per tablet
4809003001119.purpose_en: For hyperacidity, heartburn, indigestion, and gas pains. Neutralizes stomach acid.
4809003001119.purpose_fil: Para sa hyperacidity, heartburn, indigestion, at sakit ng tiyan dahil sa gas. Nagpapababa ng asido sa sikmura.
4809003001119.precautions_en: Do not exceed 8 tablets in 24 hours. Consult a doctor if symptoms persist for more than 2 weeks.
4809003001119.precautions_fil: Huwag uminom ng higit sa 8 tableta sa loob ng 24 oras. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung magpatuloy ang sintomas ng mahigit sa 2 linggo.
4809003001119.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets 1 hour after meals and at bedtime, as needed.

4809003001126.dosage_hint: Aluminum Hydroxide + Magnesium Hydroxide + Simethicone per chewable tablet
4809003001126.purpose_en: Fast-acting relief of heartburn, acid indigestion, and bloating.
4809003001126.purpose_fil: Mabilis na lunas sa heartburn, acid indigestion, at pamamaga ng tiyan.
4809003001126.precautions_en: Do not take more than recommended. See a doctor if symptoms persist.
4809003001126.precautions_fil: Huwag uminom ng higit sa inirekomenda. Kumita sa doktor kung nagpatuloy ang sintomas.
4809003001126.frequency_hint: Chew 1 to 2 tablets as needed, preferably after meals.

4800016100007.dosage_hint: B-Complex Vitamins + Vitamin C + Iron per tablet
4800016100007.purpose_en: Daily multivitamin and mineral supplement to support energy, immunity, and overall health.
4800016100007.purpose_fil: Araw-araw na supplement ng multivitamin at mineral para sa enerhiya, resistensya, at kalusugan.
4800016100007.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Iron content may cause dark stool; this is normal.
4800016100007.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa inirekomendang dosis. Ang iron ay maaaring makapagpaitim ng dumi; normal ito.
4800016100007.frequency_hint: 1 tablet daily, preferably after a meal.

4800016100014.dosage_hint: Vitamin B1, B2, B6, B12, Niacinamide, Pantothenic Acid, Vitamin C per tablet
4800016100014.purpose_en: Multivitamin supplement with high-dose Vitamin C to boost immunity and fight fatigue.
4800016100014.purpose_fil: Supplement na multivitamin na may mataas na Vitamin C para palakasin ang immune system at labanan ang pagod.
4800016100014.precautions_en: Safe for adults. Consult a pediatrician before giving to children.
4800016100014.precautions_fil: Ligtas para sa mga matatanda. Kumonsulta sa pediatrician bago ibigay sa mga bata.

4800016100021.dosage_hint: B-Complex Vitamins + Vitamin C + Zinc per tablet
4800016100021.purpose_en: Multivitamin supplement for active adults. Supports energy metabolism and immune function.
4800016100021.purpose_fil: Supplement ng multivitamin para sa aktibong mga matatanda. Nagbibigay ng enerhiya at nagpapatibay ng immune system.
4800016100021.precautions_en: For adults only. Keep out of reach of children.
4800016100021.precautions_fil: Para sa mga matatanda lamang. Ilagay sa lugar na hindi maaabot ng mga bata.
4800016100021.frequency_hint: 1 tablet once daily with a meal.

4800016650984.dosage_hint: B-Complex Vitamins + Vitamin C + Vitamin E + Iron per tablet
4800016650984.purpose_en: High-potency B-Complex vitamin supplement for stress, fatigue, and overall wellness.
4800016650984.purpose_fil: Mataas na potency na supplement ng B-Complex vitamins para sa stress, pagod, at pangkalahatang kalusugan.
4800016650984.precautions_en: Take with food to avoid stomach upset. Iron may cause constipation in some people.
4800016650984.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain para maiwasan ang sakit ng tiyan. Ang iron ay maaaring magdulot ng constipation.

4800016650991.dosage_hint: B-Complex Vitamins + Vitamin C + Vitamin E + Zinc per tablet
4800016650991.purpose_en: Stress formula multivitamins with zinc for immunity, wound healing, and stress relief.
4800016650991.purpose_fil: Multivitamin para sa stress na may zinc para sa resistensya, pagpapagaling ng sugat, at pahinga mula sa stress.
4800016650991.precautions_en: Take with food. Not a substitute for a balanced diet.
4800016650991.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Hindi kapalit ng balanseng diyeta.

4800016620032.dosage_hint: Chlorella Growth Factor + Lysine + Taurine + Zinc + Vitamins per capsule
4800016620032.purpose_en: Nutritional supplement for children to support growth, immunity, and overall development.
4800016620032.purpose_fil: Supplement para sa paglaki ng mga bata at pagpapalakas ng immune system.
4800016620032.precautions_en: Consult a pediatrician before use. Follow age-appropriate dosage.
4800016620032.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa pediatrician bago gamitin. Sundin ang dosis na angkop sa edad.
4800016620032.frequency_hint: 1 capsule once daily or as directed by your doctor.

4800016600002.purpose_en: Vitamin C supplement for children to boost immunity and support growth and development.
4800016600002.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin C para sa mga bata pampalakas ng resistensya at para sa paglaki at pag-unlad.
4800016600002.precautions_en: Shake well before use. Refrigerate after opening. Follow dosage by age/weight.
4800016600002.precautions_fil: Iyanig bago gamitin. Ilagay sa ref pagkatapos buksan. Sundin ang dosis ayon sa edad/timbang.
4800016600002.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016200012.dosage_hint: Vitamin A + Vitamin C + Vitamin E + Zinc per softgel
4800016200012.purpose_en: Antioxidant supplement for immune defense, skin health, and eye health.
4800016200012.purpose_fil: Antioxidant supplement para sa immune system, kalusugan ng balat at mata.
4800016200012.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Consult a doctor if pregnant.
4800016200012.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa inirekomendang dosis. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung buntis.

4806006210016.dosage_hint: 300mg Vitex negundo (Lagundi) leaf extract per tablet
4806006210016.purpose_en: Herbal medicine for cough, asthma, and bronchitis. FDA-approved Philippine herbal medicine.
4806006210016.purpose_fil: Halamang gamot para sa ubo, hika, at bronchitis. Aprubado ng FDA Philippines na halamang gamot.
4806006210016.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if symptoms do not improve in 7 days. Not for children under 7 years.
4806006210016.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung hindi bumuti ang kondisyon sa loob ng 7 araw. Hindi para sa mga batang wala pang 7 taon.
4806006210016.frequency_hint: 1 tablet 3 times daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4806006210023.purpose_en: Herbal cough syrup from Lagundi (Philippine Five-Leaved Chaste Tree). For dry and productive cough.
4806006210023.purpose_fil: Halamang syrup mula sa lagundi. Para sa tuyong ubo at ubo na may plema.
4806006210023.precautions_en: Shake before use. Consult a doctor for children under 7 years. Store in a cool, dry place.
4806006210023.precautions_fil: Iyanig bago gamitin. Kumonsulta sa doktor para sa mga batang wala pang 7 taon.
4806006210023.frequency_hint: Adults: 10mL 3 times daily. Children: 5mL 3 times daily, or as directed.

4806006320014.dosage_hint: 500mg Blumea balsamifera (Sambong) leaf extract per tablet
4806006320014.purpose_en: Herbal medicine for kidney stones (urinary calculi) and as a diuretic. FDA-approved Philippine herbal.
4806006320014.purpose_fil: Halamang gamot para sa bato sa bato (urinary calculi) at bilang diuretic. Aprubado ng FDA Philippines.
4806006320014.precautions_en: Consult a doctor before use. Not recommended for pregnant women. Drink plenty of water.
4806006320014.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor bago gamitin. Hindi inirerekomenda sa mga buntis. Uminom ng maraming tubig.
4806006320014.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets 3 times daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4807788570016.purpose_en: Antibiotic for bacterial infections including respiratory tract, urinary tract, and skin infections.
4807788570016.purpose_fil: Antibiotic para sa impeksyon ng bacteria kabilang ang respiratory tract, urinary tract, at impeksyon ng balat.
4807788570016.precautions_en: Complete the full course. Tell your doctor if you are allergic to penicillin. May cause diarrhea.
4807788570016.precautions_fil: Tapusin ang buong kurso. Sabihin sa doktor kung may allergy ka sa penicillin. Maaaring magdulot ng pagtatae.
4807788570016.frequency_hint: 1 capsule every 8 hours for 7 to 10 days, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4807788570023.purpose_en: Antibiotic for mild to moderate bacterial infections.
4807788570023.purpose_fil: Antibiotic para sa banayad hanggang katamtamang impeksyon ng bacteria.
4807788570023.precautions_en: Complete the full course of treatment. Do not use if allergic to penicillin.
4807788570023.precautions_fil: Tapusin ang buong kurso ng paggamot. Huwag gamitin kung may allergy sa penicillin.
4807788570023.frequency_hint: 1 capsule every 8 hours, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016350016.purpose_en: Antihypertensive (ARB). For high blood pressure and to protect kidneys in diabetic patients.
4800016350016.purpose_fil: Para sa mataas na presyon ng dugo (antihypertensive). Nagpoprotekta rin sa bato ng mga pasyenteng may diyabetes.
4800016350016.precautions_en: Do NOT take if pregnant (can harm unborn baby). Monitor blood pressure regularly. Avoid potassium supplements unless prescribed.
4800016350016.precautions_fil: HUWAG uminom kung buntis (nakakasama sa sanggol). Regular na subaybayan ang presyon ng dugo.
4800016350016.frequency_hint: 50mg once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016350023.purpose_en: Higher-dose antihypertensive (ARB) for blood pressure control and kidney protection.
4800016350023.purpose_fil: Mas mataas na dosis ng antihypertensive para sa kontrol ng presyon ng dugo at proteksyon sa bato.
4800016350023.precautions_en: Do NOT take if pregnant. Inform your doctor about all medications you are taking. Regular check-ups required.
4800016350023.precautions_fil: HUWAG uminom kung buntis. Sabihin sa doktor ang lahat ng iyong iniinom na gamot. Kailangan ng regular na check-up.
4800016350023.frequency_hint: Once daily or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016360015.purpose_en: Calcium channel blocker for high blood pressure (hypertension) and angina (chest pain).
4800016360015.purpose_fil: Calcium channel blocker para sa mataas na presyon ng dugo at angina (sakit ng dibdib).
4800016360015.precautions_en: May cause ankle swelling and flushing. Do not stop suddenly without doctor's advice. Monitor blood pressure.
4800016360015.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng pamamaga ng ankle at pamumula. Huwag biglang itigil nang walang payo ng doktor.
4800016360015.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016360022.purpose_en: Calcium channel blocker for blood pressure control and angina management.
4800016360022.purpose_fil: Calcium channel blocker para sa kontrol ng presyon ng dugo at pamamahala ng angina.
4800016360022.precautions_en: Take at the same time each day. Do not stop without consulting your doctor.
4800016360022.precautions_fil: Inumin sa parehong oras araw-araw. Huwag itigil nang walang kumonsulta sa doktor.
4800016360022.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016370014.purpose_en: Oral antidiabetic. Controls blood sugar levels in Type 2 diabetes.
4800016370014.purpose_fil: Oral na gamot para sa diyabetes. Nagkokontrol ng antas ng asukal sa dugo sa Type 2 na diyabetes.
4800016370014.precautions_en: Take with meals to reduce stomach upset. Avoid alcohol. Report any muscle pain or weakness to your doctor.
4800016370014.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain para mabawasan ang sakit ng tiyan. Iwasan ang alak. I-report ang pananakit ng kalamnan sa doktor.
4800016370014.frequency_hint: 500mg 2 to 3 times daily with meals, or as prescribed.

4800016370021.purpose_en: Antidiabetic for controlling blood sugar in Type 2 diabetes.
4800016370021.purpose_fil: Gamot sa diyabetes para sa kontrol ng asukal sa dugo sa Type 2 na diyabetes.
4800016370021.precautions_en: Take with meals. Inform your doctor if you will have surgery or imaging tests using dye. Monitor kidney function.
4800016370021.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Sabihin sa doktor kung magpapaoperasyon o magpapagawa ng imaging test na may dye.
4800016370021.frequency_hint: Once or twice daily with meals, or as prescribed.

4800016380013.purpose_en: Statin for lowering bad cholesterol (LDL) and reducing risk of heart disease and stroke.
4800016380013.purpose_fil: Para sa pagpapababa ng masamang cholesterol (LDL) at pagbabawas ng panganib ng sakit sa puso at stroke.
4800016380013.precautions_en: Report muscle pain to your doctor immediately. Avoid grapefruit juice. Do not take if pregnant.
4800016380013.precautions_fil: I-report agad ang pananakit ng kalamnan sa doktor. Iwasan ang grapefruit juice. Huwag uminom kung buntis.
4800016380013.frequency_hint: Once daily at bedtime, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016380020.purpose_en: Statin for significantly lowering LDL cholesterol and triglycerides.
4800016380020.purpose_fil: Para sa malaking pagbaba ng LDL cholesterol at triglycerides.
4800016380020.precautions_en: Report any unexplained muscle pain, weakness, or tenderness to your doctor. Liver function tests may be needed.
4800016380020.precautions_fil: I-report ang anumang hindi maipaliwanag na pananakit ng kalamnan, panghihina, o masakit sa doktor.

4800016380037.purpose_en: High-dose statin therapy for high cholesterol and cardiovascular risk reduction.
4800016380037.purpose_fil: Mataas na dosis ng statin para sa mataas na cholesterol at pagbabawas ng panganib sa puso.
4800016380037.precautions_en: Regular liver function monitoring required. Report muscle pain immediately.
4800016380037.precautions_fil: Kailangan ng regular na pagsubaybay ng liver function. I-report agad ang pananakit ng kalamnan.

4800016390012.purpose_en: Proton pump inhibitor (PPI). Reduces stomach acid for GERD, ulcers, and acid reflux.
4800016390012.purpose_fil: Para sa pagbabawas ng asido sa sikmura para sa GERD, ulcer, at acid reflux.
4800016390012.precautions_en: Take 30 to 60 minutes before meals. Long-term use may affect magnesium and vitamin B12 levels.
4800016390012.precautions_fil: Inumin 30 hanggang 60 minuto bago kumain. Ang matagalang paggamit ay maaaring makaapekto sa magnesium at vitamin B12.
4800016390012.frequency_hint: Once daily before breakfast, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016390029.purpose_en: Higher-dose PPI for severe GERD, H. pylori eradication (in combination), and Zollinger-Ellison syndrome.
4800016390029.purpose_fil: Mas mataas na dosis ng PPI para sa malubhang GERD at H. pylori eradication.
4800016390029.precautions_en: Use only as prescribed. Consult a doctor before taking with other medications.
4800016390029.precautions_fil: Gamitin lamang ayon sa reseta. Kumonsulta sa doktor bago uminom kasabay ng ibang gamot.
4800016390029.frequency_hint: Once or twice daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016391019.purpose_en: Proton pump inhibitor for heartburn, GERD, and stomach ulcers.
4800016391019.purpose_fil: Proton pump inhibitor para sa heartburn, GERD, at ulcer sa sikmura.
4800016391019.precautions_en: Swallow whole, do not crush. Take 1 hour before eating. May interact with clopidogrel.
4800016391019.precautions_fil: Lunukin nang buo, huwag durugin. Inumin 1 oras bago kumain. Maaaring makipag-interact sa clopidogrel.

4800016400018.purpose_en: Antihistamine for allergic rhinitis, urticaria (hives), and other allergic conditions.
4800016400018.purpose_fil: Antihistamine para sa allergic rhinitis, urticaria (pantal), at iba pang kondisyong allergic.
4800016400018.precautions_en: May cause mild drowsiness. Avoid alcohol. Use with caution when driving.
4800016400018.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng banayad na pagkaantok. Iwasan ang alak. Mag-ingat sa pagmamaneho.
4800016400018.frequency_hint: 1 tablet once daily, preferably in the evening.

4800016400025.purpose_en: Antihistamine syrup for children with allergic rhinitis, hives, and skin allergies.
4800016400025.purpose_fil: Antihistamine syrup para sa mga batang may allergic rhinitis, pantal, at allergy sa balat.
4800016400025.precautions_en: Follow age-appropriate dosage. May cause drowsiness in children.
4800016400025.precautions_fil: Sundin ang tamang dosis para sa edad. Maaaring makaantok sa mga bata.
4800016400025.frequency_hint: Children 6-11: 5mL (5mg) once or twice daily. Children 2-5: 2.5mL once or twice daily.

4800016410017.purpose_en: Non-drowsy antihistamine for hay fever, allergic rhinitis, and hives.
4800016410017.purpose_fil: Hindi nakakaantok na antihistamine para sa hay fever, allergic rhinitis, at pantal.
4800016410017.precautions_en: Generally does not cause drowsiness at recommended dose. Safe for daytime use.
4800016410017.precautions_fil: Hindi karaniwang nagdudulot ng antok sa tamang dosis. Ligtas gamitin sa umaga.

4800016420016.purpose_en: Bronchodilator for asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Relieves wheezing and shortness of breath.
4800016420016.purpose_fil: Para sa hika at COPD. Nagpapababa ng panghihikab at hirap sa paghinga.
4800016420016.precautions_en: May cause tremors and rapid heartbeat. Use as directed. Do not exceed prescribed dose.
4800016420016.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng panginginig at mabilis na tibok ng puso. Gamitin ayon sa iniutos. Huwag lampasan ang iniresetang dosis.
4800016420016.frequency_hint: Adults: 2mg to 4mg 3 to 4 times daily. Children: as prescribed by doctor.

4800016430015.purpose_en: Antibiotic (macrolide) for respiratory tract infections, skin infections, and STIs.
4800016430015.purpose_fil: Antibiotic (macrolide) para sa impeksyon ng respiratory tract, balat, at STI.
4800016430015.precautions_en: Take at the same time each day. May be taken with or without food. Complete the prescribed course.
4800016430015.precautions_fil: Inumin sa parehong oras araw-araw. Maaaring inumin nang may pagkain o wala. Tapusin ang buong kurso.
4800016430015.frequency_hint: 500mg once daily for 3 days, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016430022.purpose_en: Antibiotic for mild respiratory, ear, and skin infections.
4800016430022.purpose_fil: Antibiotic para sa banayad na impeksyon ng respiratory, tainga, at balat.
4800016430022.precautions_en: Complete the full course. Inform your doctor of any heart rhythm problems.
4800016430022.precautions_fil: Tapusin ang buong kurso. Sabihin sa doktor kung may problema sa ritmo ng puso.
4800016430022.frequency_hint: As prescribed by your doctor, typically 500mg on day 1, then 250mg on days 2-5.

4800016440014.purpose_en: Antibiotic for respiratory tract infections, H. pylori eradication, and skin infections.
4800016440014.purpose_fil: Antibiotic para sa impeksyon ng respiratory tract, H. pylori eradication, at impeksyon ng balat.
4800016440014.precautions_en: Take with food to reduce stomach upset. Inform your doctor about other medications you take.
4800016440014.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain para mabawasan ang sakit ng tiyan. Sabihin sa doktor ang iyong ibang gamot.
4800016440014.frequency_hint: 500mg twice daily for 7 to 14 days, or as prescribed.

4800016450013.purpose_en: Broad-spectrum antibiotic combination for respiratory, urinary, and skin infections resistant to amoxicillin alone.
4800016450013.purpose_fil: Malawak na spectrum na antibiotic para sa mga impeksyong lumalaban sa amoxicillin lamang.
4800016450013.precautions_en: Take with food. Inform your doctor if allergic to penicillin. Complete the full prescribed course.
4800016450013.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Sabihin sa doktor kung allergic sa penicillin. Tapusin ang buong kurso.
4800016450013.frequency_hint: 1 tablet twice daily (every 12 hours), or as prescribed.

4800016460012.purpose_en: Broad-spectrum antibiotic (fluoroquinolone) for urinary tract infections, respiratory infections, and typhoid.
4800016460012.purpose_fil: Malawak na spectrum na antibiotic para sa impeksyon ng ihi, respiratory, at typhoid.
4800016460012.precautions_en: Avoid antacids, calcium, and iron supplements within 2 hours of taking. Avoid excessive sun exposure.
4800016460012.precautions_fil: Iwasan ang antacid, calcium, at iron supplements 2 oras bago/pagkatapos uminom. Iwasan ang sobrang araw.
4800016460012.frequency_hint: 500mg twice daily for 7 to 14 days, or as prescribed.

4800016470011.purpose_en: COX-2 inhibitor NSAID for osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and acute pain. Lower GI risk than traditional NSAIDs.
4800016470011.purpose_fil: COX-2 inhibitor para sa arthritis at matinding sakit. Mas mababang panganib sa sikmura kaysa karaniwang NSAIDs.
4800016470011.precautions_en: Avoid if you have heart disease or had a stroke. May cause cardiovascular events. Not for use after heart bypass surgery.
4800016470011.precautions_fil: Iwasan kung may sakit sa puso o nagkaroon ng stroke. Maaaring magdulot ng cardiovascular events.
4800016470011.frequency_hint: 100mg to 200mg twice daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016480010.purpose_en: COX-2 selective NSAID for osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis, and gout attacks.
4800016480010.purpose_fil: COX-2 selective NSAID para sa arthritis at gout.
4800016480010.precautions_en: Not for patients with uncontrolled hypertension. Cardiovascular risk increases with dose and duration.
4800016480010.precautions_fil: Hindi para sa mga may hindi nakontrolong hypertension. Ang panganib sa puso ay tumataas sa mas mataas na dosis.
4800016480010.frequency_hint: 60mg once daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016480027.purpose_en: Higher-dose COX-2 inhibitor for acute gout and moderate to severe pain.
4800016480027.purpose_fil: Mas mataas na dosis ng COX-2 inhibitor para sa acute gout at matinding sakit.
4800016480027.precautions_en: Use the lowest effective dose for the shortest duration needed. Monitor blood pressure.
4800016480027.precautions_fil: Gamitin ang pinakamababang epektibong dosis sa pinakamaikling panahon. Subaybayan ang presyon ng dugo.
4800016480027.frequency_hint: 90mg once daily for gout, or as prescribed.

4800016490009.purpose_en: NSAID for pain, inflammation, and fever. Used for arthritis, sprains, and dysmenorrhea.
4800016490009.purpose_fil: NSAID para sa sakit, pamamaga, at lagnat. Ginagamit para sa arthritis, sprain, at dysmenorrhea.
4800016490009.precautions_en: Take with food or milk. Avoid if you have stomach ulcers or kidney problems. Cardiovascular risk with long-term use.
4800016490009.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain o gatas. Iwasan kung may ulcer o sakit sa bato.
4800016490009.frequency_hint: 50mg 2 to 3 times daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016500005.purpose_en: NSAID for pain, arthritis, menstrual cramps, and fever. Longer-acting than ibuprofen.
4800016500005.purpose_fil: NSAID para sa sakit, arthritis, menstrual cramps, at lagnat. Mas matagal ang epekto kaysa ibuprofen.
4800016500005.precautions_en: Take with food. Avoid with other NSAIDs. Not for children under 12.
4800016500005.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Iwasan kasabay ng ibang NSAIDs. Hindi para sa mga batang wala pang 12 taon.

4800016510004.purpose_en: Oral antidiabetic (sulfonylurea) that stimulates insulin production in Type 2 diabetes.
4800016510004.purpose_fil: Oral na gamot sa diyabetes na nagpapasigla ng produksyon ng insulin sa Type 2 diabetes.
4800016510004.precautions_en: Take with breakfast. May cause low blood sugar (hypoglycemia). Monitor glucose regularly.
4800016510004.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng almusal. Maaaring magdulot ng mababang asukal sa dugo. Regular na subaybayan ang glucose.
4800016510004.frequency_hint: 2mg once daily with breakfast, or as prescribed.

4800016520003.purpose_en: Modified-release antidiabetic for Type 2 diabetes. Controls blood sugar throughout the day.
4800016520003.purpose_fil: Modified-release na gamot sa diyabetes para sa Type 2. Nagkokontrol ng asukal sa buong araw.
4800016520003.precautions_en: Take with breakfast. Risk of hypoglycemia; carry glucose tablets. Monitor blood sugar regularly.
4800016520003.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng almusal. Panganib ng mababang asukal; magdala ng glucose tablets. Regular na subaybayan ang asukal sa dugo.
4800016520003.frequency_hint: 30mg to 120mg once daily with breakfast, or as prescribed.

4800016530002.purpose_en: Antiplatelet agent to prevent blood clots in heart attack, stroke, and peripheral artery disease.
4800016530002.purpose_fil: Para sa pag-iwas ng pamumuo ng dugo sa atake sa puso, stroke, at peripheral artery disease.
4800016530002.precautions_en: Tell all doctors and dentists you take this drug before any procedures. May increase bleeding risk. Do not stop without asking your doctor.
4800016530002.precautions_fil: Sabihin sa lahat ng doktor at dentista na iniinom mo ito bago ang anumang prosedyur. Maaaring dagdagan ang panganib ng pagdurugo.
4800016530002.frequency_hint: 75mg once daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016540001.purpose_en: Diuretic (water pill) for hypertension and edema. Reduces fluid retention.
4800016540001.purpose_fil: Diuretic para sa mataas na presyon at pamamaga dahil sa labis na tubig.
4800016540001.precautions_en: May cause low potassium and frequent urination. Take in the morning to avoid nighttime urination.
4800016540001.precautions_fil: Maaaring magbaba ng potassium at magdulot ng madalas na pag-ihi. Inumin sa umaga para maiwasan ang gabi na pag-ihi.
4800016540001.frequency_hint: 25mg once daily in the morning, or as prescribed.

4800016550000.purpose_en: Loop diuretic for edema due to heart failure, kidney disease, or liver disease.
4800016550000.purpose_fil: Loop diuretic para sa pamamaga dahil sa heart failure, sakit sa bato, o sakit sa atay.
4800016550000.precautions_en: Take with food. May cause low potassium, sodium, and dehydration. Monitor electrolytes.
4800016550000.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Maaaring magbaba ng potassium at sodium. Subaybayan ang mga elektrolito.
4800016550000.frequency_hint: As prescribed by your doctor, usually once or twice daily.

4800016560009.purpose_en: Beta-blocker for heart failure, hypertension, and after heart attack.
4800016560009.purpose_fil: Beta-blocker para sa heart failure, mataas na presyon, at pagkatapos ng atake sa puso.
4800016560009.precautions_en: Do not stop suddenly. May cause dizziness, especially on standing. Monitor heart rate and blood pressure.
4800016560009.precautions_fil: Huwag biglang itigil. Maaaring magdulot ng hilo, lalo na sa pag-alalay. Subaybayan ang tibok ng puso at presyon ng dugo.
4800016560009.frequency_hint: Starting dose 6.25mg twice daily, titrated up as tolerated.

4800016570008.purpose_en: ACE inhibitor for hypertension, heart failure, and kidney protection in diabetes.
4800016570008.purpose_fil: ACE inhibitor para sa mataas na presyon, heart failure, at proteksyon ng bato sa diyabetes.
4800016570008.precautions_en: May cause dry cough. Do NOT take if pregnant. Monitor potassium levels. Report swelling of face/throat immediately.
4800016570008.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng tuyong ubo. HUWAG uminom kung buntis. Subaybayan ang potassium. I-report ang pamamaga ng mukha/lalamunan.

4800016580007.purpose_en: Statin for reducing cholesterol and risk of heart disease and stroke.
4800016580007.purpose_fil: Para sa pagbabawas ng cholesterol at panganib ng sakit sa puso at stroke.
4800016580007.precautions_en: Take at bedtime. Avoid large amounts of grapefruit juice. Report muscle pain immediately.
4800016580007.precautions_fil: Inumin bago matulog. Iwasan ang mataas na dosis ng grapefruit juice. I-report agad ang pananakit ng kalamnan.

4800016590006.purpose_en: High-potency statin for lowering LDL cholesterol and preventing cardiovascular events.
4800016590006.purpose_fil: Mataas na potency na statin para sa pagbababa ng LDL cholesterol at pag-iwas ng cardiovascular events.
4800016590006.precautions_en: Report muscle pain or weakness immediately. Not for pregnant or breastfeeding women. Monitor liver function.
4800016590006.precautions_fil: I-report agad ang pananakit o panghihina ng kalamnan. Hindi para sa mga buntis o nagpapasuso. Subaybayan ang liver function.
4800016590006.frequency_hint: Once daily at any time of day, with or without food.

4800016870007.purpose_en: Proton pump inhibitor for GERD, acid reflux, and stomach ulcers.
4800016870007.purpose_fil: Proton pump inhibitor para sa GERD, acid reflux, at ulcer sa sikmura.
4800016870007.precautions_en: Swallow whole, do not crush or chew. Take 30 to 60 minutes before meals.
4800016870007.precautions_fil: Lunukin nang buo, huwag durugin o nguyain. Inumin 30 hanggang 60 minuto bago kumain.
4800016870007.frequency_hint: Once daily before breakfast, or as directed.

4800016880006.purpose_en: H2 blocker for acid reflux, heartburn, and peptic ulcer treatment.
4800016880006.purpose_fil: H2 blocker para sa acid reflux, heartburn, at paggamot ng peptic ulcer.
4800016880006.precautions_en: NOTE: Some ranitidine products have been recalled due to NDMA contamination. Consult your doctor for alternatives.
4800016880006.precautions_fil: PAALALA: Ang ilang ranitidine products ay na-recall dahil sa NDMA contamination. Kumonsulta sa doktor para sa alternatibo.
4800016880006.frequency_hint: 150mg twice daily or 300mg once daily at bedtime, or as prescribed.

4800016600155.purpose_en: Vitamin C supplement for immune health, antioxidant protection, and collagen synthesis.
4800016600155.purpose_fil: Supplement na Vitamin C para sa immune system, proteksyon ng antioxidant, at synthesis ng collagen.
4800016600155.precautions_en: High doses (above 2000mg daily) may cause diarrhea. Consult a doctor if you have kidney stones.
4800016600155.precautions_fil: Ang mataas na dosis (higit sa 2000mg bawat araw) ay maaaring magdulot ng pagtatae. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may bato sa bato.

4800016600162.purpose_en: High-dose Vitamin C for immune support and antioxidant protection.
4800016600162.purpose_fil: Mataas na dosis ng Vitamin C para sa immune support at proteksyon ng antioxidant.
4800016600162.precautions_en: Do not exceed 2000mg per day. May cause kidney stones in predisposed individuals.
4800016600162.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa 2000mg bawat araw. Maaaring magdulot ng bato sa bato sa ilang tao.

4800016610006.purpose_en: Zinc supplement for immune function, wound healing, and treatment of zinc deficiency.
4800016610006.purpose_fil: Zinc supplement para sa immune system, pagpapagaling ng sugat, at paggamot ng kakulangan ng zinc.
4800016610006.precautions_en: Take with food to reduce nausea. Do not take with certain antibiotics simultaneously.
4800016610006.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain para maiwasan ang pagduduwal. Huwag inumin kasabay ng ilang antibiotics.
4800016610006.frequency_hint: Once daily with food, or as directed.

4800016620049.dosage_hint: 60mg Elemental Iron + 400mcg Folic Acid per tablet
4800016620049.purpose_en: Iron and folic acid supplement for pregnant women and those with iron-deficiency anemia.
4800016620049.purpose_fil: Supplement na iron at folic acid para sa mga buntis at sa mga may iron-deficiency anemia.
4800016620049.precautions_en: May cause constipation and dark stools. Take on an empty stomach or with Vitamin C for better absorption.
4800016620049.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng constipation at itim na dumi. Inumin sa walang laman ang sikmura o kasabay ng Vitamin C para mas mahusay na absorb.
4800016620049.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4800016630005.dosage_hint: 500mg Calcium Carbonate per tablet (200mg elemental calcium)
4800016630005.purpose_en: Calcium supplement for bone health and prevention of osteoporosis.
4800016630005.purpose_fil: Supplement na calcium para sa kalusugan ng buto at pag-iwas sa osteoporosis.
4800016630005.precautions_en: Take with food for better absorption. Do not exceed 2500mg calcium per day.
4800016630005.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain para mas mahusay na absorb. Huwag lumampas sa 2500mg calcium bawat araw.
4800016630005.frequency_hint: 500mg to 1000mg daily in divided doses with meals.

4800016640004.dosage_hint: 568mg Sodium Ascorbate (equivalent to 500mg Vitamin C) per capsule
4800016640004.purpose_en: Non-acidic form of Vitamin C, gentler on the stomach. For immune health and antioxidant protection.
4800016640004.purpose_fil: Hindi acidic na anyo ng Vitamin C, mas malambot sa sikmura. Para sa immune system at antioxidant protection.
4800016640004.precautions_en: Generally well-tolerated. Consult a doctor if you have kidney disease.
4800016640004.precautions_fil: Karaniwang hindi nagdudulot ng problema. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may sakit sa bato.
4800016640004.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 capsules daily, or as directed.

4807388100010.purpose_en: Antiemetic for nausea and vomiting. Also used for delayed gastric emptying.
4807388100010.purpose_fil: Para sa pagduduwal at pagsusuka. Ginagamit din para sa mabagal na paglabas ng pagkain mula sa sikmura.
4807388100010.precautions_en: Do not use for more than 7 days without medical advice. Risk of cardiac arrhythmia at high doses.
4807388100010.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin ng mahigit 7 araw nang walang payo ng doktor. Panganib ng cardiac arrhythmia sa mataas na dosis.
4807388100010.frequency_hint: 10mg 3 times daily, 15 to 30 minutes before meals.

4807388100027.purpose_en: Antiemetic and gastroprokinetic for nausea, vomiting, and GERD.
4807388100027.purpose_fil: Para sa pagduduwal, pagsusuka, at GERD.
4807388100027.precautions_en: Long-term use may cause tardive dyskinesia. Do not use in patients with GI obstruction.
4807388100027.precautions_fil: Ang matagalang paggamit ay maaaring magdulot ng tardive dyskinesia. Huwag gamitin kung may halong GI tract.
4807388100027.frequency_hint: 10mg 3 times daily before meals, or as prescribed.

4807388110019.purpose_en: Antispasmodic for abdominal cramps and pain due to irritable bowel syndrome and other GI spasms.
4807388110019.purpose_fil: Para sa pananakit at pag-ikot ng tiyan dahil sa irritable bowel syndrome at iba pang spasm ng GI.
4807388110019.precautions_en: May cause dry mouth, blurred vision, and difficulty urinating. Avoid in glaucoma.
4807388110019.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng tuyong bibig, malabong paningin, at hirap sa pag-ihi. Iwasan kung may glaucoma.
4807388110019.frequency_hint: 10mg to 20mg 3 to 4 times daily, or as prescribed.

4807388120018.purpose_en: Antacid suspension for fast relief of heartburn, acid indigestion, and stomach upset.
4807388120018.purpose_fil: Antacid suspension para sa mabilis na pampawala ng heartburn, acid indigestion, at sakit ng sikmura.
4807388120018.precautions_en: Shake well before use. Do not use if kidney problems. Separate from other medications by 2 hours.
4807388120018.precautions_fil: Iyanig bago gamitin. Huwag gamitin kung may sakit sa bato. Paghiwalayin ng 2 oras mula sa ibang gamot.
4807388120018.frequency_hint: 10mL to 20mL 4 times daily, 20 minutes to 1 hour after meals and at bedtime.

4806516000011.purpose_en: Antiseptic mouthwash for sore throat, mouth infections, and oral hygiene.
4806516000011.purpose_fil: Antiseptic mouthwash para sa masakit na lalamunan, impeksyon sa bibig, at oral hygiene.
4806516000011.precautions_en: Do not swallow. Not for children under 6. Do not use more than 3 times daily.
4806516000011.precautions_fil: Huwag lunukin. Hindi para sa mga batang wala pang 6 taon. Huwag gamitin ng higit sa 3 beses bawat araw.
4806516000011.frequency_hint: Gargle 15mL undiluted for 30 seconds, 2 to 3 times daily.

4800016700008.purpose_en: Antiseptic for minor wounds, cuts, and skin infections.
4800016700008.purpose_fil: Antiseptic para sa maliit na sugat, gasgas, at impeksyon ng balat.
4800016700008.precautions_en: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Do not use on deep wounds without medical advice.
4800016700008.precautions_fil: Para sa panlabas na paggamit lamang. Iwasan ang contact sa mata. Huwag gamitin sa malalim na sugat nang walang payo ng doktor.
4800016700008.frequency_hint: Apply to affected area 1 to 3 times daily, or as directed.

4800016710007.purpose_en: Antifungal cream for athlete's foot, ringworm, jock itch, and other fungal skin infections.
4800016710007.purpose_fil: Antifungal cream para sa athlete's foot, buni, at iba pang impeksyon ng balat na dulot ng fungi.
4800016710007.precautions_en: For external use only. Apply to clean, dry skin. Avoid eyes and mucous membranes.
4800016710007.precautions_fil: Para sa panlabas na paggamit lamang. Lagyan ng malinis at tuyong balat. Iwasan ang mata at mucous membranes.
4800016710007.frequency_hint: Apply twice daily for 2 to 4 weeks, or until cleared.

4800016720006.purpose_en: Topical antibiotic for impetigo and other bacterial skin infections.
4800016720006.purpose_fil: Topical antibiotic para sa impetigo at iba pang impeksyon ng balat na dulot ng bacteria.
4800016720006.precautions_en: For external use only. Avoid eyes. Contact your doctor if no improvement after 5 days.
4800016720006.precautions_fil: Para sa panlabas na paggamit lamang. Iwasan ang mata. Makipag-ugnayan sa doktor kung walang pagbabago pagkatapos ng 5 araw.
4800016720006.frequency_hint: Apply to affected area 3 times daily for 5 to 10 days.

4800016730005.purpose_en: Mild topical corticosteroid for eczema, allergic skin reactions, and insect bites.
4800016730005.purpose_fil: Banayad na topical corticosteroid para sa eczema, allergic na reaksyon sa balat, at kagat ng insekto.
4800016730005.precautions_en: Do not use on infected skin. Avoid face and groin unless prescribed. Do not use for more than 7 days without medical advice.
4800016730005.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin sa may impeksyong balat. Iwasan ang mukha at singit maliban kung iniutos. Huwag gamitin ng mahigit 7 araw nang walang payo ng doktor.
4800016730005.frequency_hint: Apply thinly to affected area 2 to 3 times daily.

4800016740004.purpose_en: Antihistamine for allergic reactions, hives, itching, and as a sleep aid.
4800016740004.purpose_fil: Antihistamine para sa allergic reaction, pantal, pangangati, at bilang pampatulog.
4800016740004.precautions_en: Causes significant drowsiness. Do not drive or operate machinery. Do not use with alcohol.
4800016740004.precautions_fil: Nagdudulot ng malakas na antok. Huwag magmaneho o gumamit ng makinarya. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng alak.
4800016740004.frequency_hint: 25mg to 50mg every 4 to 6 hours as needed, or as directed.

4800016750003.purpose_en: Cough suppressant (antitussive) for dry, non-productive cough.
4800016750003.purpose_fil: Gamot para sa tuyong ubo na walang plema (antitussive).
4800016750003.precautions_en: Do not use if you have or recently used MAO inhibitors. Not for children under 6.
4800016750003.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung gumagamit o kakatupos ng MAO inhibitors. Hindi para sa mga batang wala pang 6 taon.
4800016750003.frequency_hint: 15mg to 30mg every 6 to 8 hours, or as directed.

4800016760002.purpose_en: Expectorant for productive cough. Helps thin and loosen mucus in airways.
4800016760002.purpose_fil: Expectorant para sa ubo na may plema. Nagpapalabnaw at nagpapaluwag ng plema sa daanan ng hangin.
4800016760002.precautions_en: Drink plenty of water. Do not use if cough is accompanied by high fever.
4800016760002.precautions_fil: Uminom ng maraming tubig. Huwag gamitin kung may mataas na lagnat ang ubo.
4800016760002.frequency_hint: 200mg to 400mg every 4 hours, or as directed.

4800016770001.purpose_en: Mucolytic and expectorant for respiratory conditions with excessive mucus.
4800016770001.purpose_fil: Mucolytic at expectorant para sa mga kondisyon ng respiratory na may sobrang plema.
4800016770001.precautions_en: Drink adequate fluids. Consult a doctor if symptoms worsen.
4800016770001.precautions_fil: Uminom ng sapat na tubig. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung lumala ang sintomas.
4800016770001.frequency_hint: 30mg 3 times daily, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016780000.purpose_en: Oral corticosteroid for inflammatory conditions, allergies, and autoimmune diseases.
4800016780000.purpose_fil: Oral corticosteroid para sa mga kondisyong may pamamaga, allergy, at autoimmune na sakit.
4800016780000.precautions_en: Do not stop suddenly after long-term use (taper dose). May cause increased blood sugar, bone loss, and immune suppression.
4800016780000.precautions_fil: Huwag biglang itigil pagkatapos ng matagalang paggamit (unti-unting bawasan ang dosis). Maaaring dagdagan ang asukal sa dugo at humina ang immune system.
4800016780000.frequency_hint: As prescribed by your doctor. Never self-medicate with corticosteroids.

4800016790009.purpose_en: Second-generation antihistamine for allergic rhinitis and chronic urticaria with less sedation.
4800016790009.purpose_fil: Second-generation antihistamine para sa allergic rhinitis at chronic urticaria na may kakaunting antok.
4800016790009.precautions_en: May cause mild drowsiness. Avoid alcohol. Use caution when driving.
4800016790009.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng banayad na antok. Iwasan ang alak. Mag-ingat sa pagmamaneho.

4800016800005.purpose_en: Leukotriene receptor antagonist for asthma prevention and allergic rhinitis.
4800016800005.purpose_fil: Para sa pag-iwas ng hika at allergic rhinitis.
4800016800005.precautions_en: Take at bedtime for asthma. May cause neuropsychiatric events in rare cases; monitor for behavioral changes.
4800016800005.precautions_fil: Inumin bago matulog para sa hika. Maaaring magdulot ng neuropsychiatric events sa ilang kaso; subaybayan ang pagbabago sa ugali.

4800016810004.purpose_en: Antibiotic and antiprotozoal for anaerobic bacterial infections, amoebiasis, and giardiasis.
4800016810004.purpose_fil: Antibiotic at antiprotozoal para sa anaerobic bacterial infections, amoebiasis, at giardiasis.
4800016810004.precautions_en: Do NOT drink alcohol during treatment and 48 hours after. May cause metallic taste in mouth.
4800016810004.precautions_fil: HUWAG uminom ng alak habang gumagamot at 48 oras pagkatapos. Maaaring magdulot ng metallic na lasa sa bibig.
4800016810004.frequency_hint: 500mg 3 times daily for 7 days, or as prescribed.

4800016820003.purpose_en: Antibiotic combination for urinary tract infections, traveler's diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
4800016820003.purpose_fil: Kombinasyon ng antibiotic para sa impeksyon ng ihi, traveler's diarrhea, at respiratory infections.
4800016820003.precautions_en: Drink plenty of water. Avoid sun exposure. Not for patients with sulfa allergy.
4800016820003.precautions_fil: Uminom ng maraming tubig. Iwasan ang araw. Hindi para sa mga may allergy sa sulfa.
4800016820003.frequency_hint: 2 tablets (960mg) twice daily, or as prescribed.

4800016830002.dosage_hint: Aluminum Hydroxide + Magnesium Carbonate per chewable tablet
4800016830002.purpose_en: Antacid for relief of heartburn, sour stomach, and acid indigestion.
4800016830002.purpose_fil: Antacid para sa pampawala ng heartburn, maasim na sikmura, at acid indigestion.
4800016830002.precautions_en: Chew thoroughly before swallowing. Separate from other medications by at least 2 hours.
4800016830002.precautions_fil: Nguyain nang mabuti bago lunukin. Paghiwalayin ng hindi bababa sa 2 oras mula sa ibang gamot.
4800016830002.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets after meals and at bedtime as needed.

4800016840001.purpose_en: Nitrate for prevention of angina (chest pain) in coronary artery disease.
4800016840001.purpose_fil: Para sa pag-iwas ng angina (sakit ng dibdib) sa coronary artery disease.
4800016840001.precautions_en: May cause headache (usually temporary). Do not use with phosphodiesterase inhibitors (Viagra, Cialis). Allow nitrate-free interval.
4800016840001.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng sakit ng ulo (karaniwang pansamantala). Huwag gamitin kasabay ng Viagra o Cialis.
4800016840001.frequency_hint: 30mg once daily in the morning, or as prescribed.

4800016850000.purpose_en: FDA-approved Philippine herbal medicine for cough, asthma, and fever.
4800016850000.purpose_fil: Aprubado ng FDA Philippines na halamang gamot para sa ubo, hika, at lagnat.
4800016850000.precautions_en: Consult a doctor if symptoms persist after 7 days. Not recommended for children under 7 years.
4800016850000.precautions_fil: Kumonsulta sa doktor kung hindi bumuti ang kondisyon pagkatapos ng 7 araw. Hindi inirerekomenda para sa mga batang wala pang 7 taon.
4800016850000.frequency_hint: 1 capsule 3 times daily, or as directed.

4800016860009.purpose_en: Fixed-dose combination antihypertensive for blood pressure control.
4800016860009.purpose_fil: Fixed-dose combination ng antihypertensive para sa kontrol ng presyon ng dugo.
4800016860009.precautions_en: Do NOT take if pregnant. Monitor blood pressure and kidney function. Contains both amlodipine and losartan risks.
4800016860009.precautions_fil: HUWAG uminom kung buntis. Subaybayan ang presyon ng dugo at kidney function.
4800016860009.frequency_hint: Once daily, or as prescribed by your doctor.

4807788562012.purpose_en: Antidiarrheal with gas relief for diarrhea accompanied by bloating and abdominal cramps.
4807788562012.purpose_fil: Antidiarrheal na may gas relief para sa pagtatae na may kasamang pamamaga ng tiyan at kirot.
4807788562012.precautions_en: Do not use if you have bloody diarrhea or fever. Not for children under 12.
4807788562012.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin kung may dugo sa pagtatae o lagnat. Hindi para sa mga batang wala pang 12 taon.
4807788562012.frequency_hint: Initially 2 tablets, then 1 tablet after each loose stool. Max 4 tablets per day.

4807788562029.purpose_en: Children's fever and pain reliever syrup. Safe for infants and young children when dosed correctly.
4807788562029.purpose_fil: Syrup para sa lagnat at sakit ng mga bata. Ligtas para sa mga sanggol at batang bata kung tamang dininosyo.
4807788562029.precautions_en: Dose by weight. Do not give more than 5 doses in 24 hours. Do not use with other paracetamol products.
4807788562029.precautions_fil: Dosyo ayon sa timbang. Huwag bigyan ng higit sa 5 beses sa loob ng 24 oras. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng ibang produktong may paracetamol.
4807788562029.frequency_hint: Every 4 to 6 hours as needed, based on child's weight. Follow label dosing chart.

4807788562036.purpose_en: Pain reliever and fever reducer. For headache, toothache, body aches, and fever.
4807788562036.purpose_fil: Pampawala ng sakit at lagnat. Para sa sakit ng ulo, ngipin, katawan, at lagnat.
4807788562036.precautions_en: Do not exceed 4000mg in 24 hours. Do not take with other paracetamol medicines.
4807788562036.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa 4000mg sa loob ng 24 oras. Huwag inumin kasabay ng ibang gamot na may paracetamol.
4807788562036.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed.

4807788562050.purpose_en: Children's paracetamol syrup for fever and mild to moderate pain.
4807788562050.purpose_fil: Syrup na paracetamol para sa mga bata para sa lagnat at banayad hanggang katamtamang sakit.
4807788562050.precautions_en: Do not exceed 4 doses in 24 hours. Do not use with other paracetamol products. Shake before use.
4807788562050.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa 4 na dosis sa loob ng 24 oras. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng ibang produktong paracetamol. Iyanig bago gamitin.
4807788562050.frequency_hint: Dose by age and weight every 4 to 6 hours as needed. See label for dosing chart.

4800016120009.dosage_hint: B-complex vitamins + Vitamin C + Iron + Trace elements per capsule
4800016120009.purpose_en: Multivitamin supplement for energy, immunity, and nutritional support.
4800016120009.purpose_fil: Supplement ng multivitamin para sa enerhiya, resistensya, at suporta sa nutrisyon.
4800016120009.precautions_en: Take once daily. Iron content may cause dark stools.
4800016120009.precautions_fil: Inumin isang beses bawat araw. Ang iron ay maaaring magpaitim ng dumi.
4800016120009.frequency_hint: 1 capsule once daily with a meal.

4800016130008.dosage_hint: Complete multivitamin and mineral formula per tablet
4800016130008.purpose_en: Complete daily multivitamin for adults. Fills nutritional gaps in the diet.
4800016130008.purpose_fil: Kumpletong araw-araw na multivitamin para sa mga matatanda. Pumapalya ng mga nutritional na kakulangan sa diyeta.
4800016130008.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Consult a doctor if you have a medical condition.
4800016130008.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa inirekomendang dosis. Kumonsulta sa doktor kung may kondisyong medikal.

4800016140007.display_name: Scott's Emulsion (Cod Liver Oil + Vitamin D + Calcium)
4800016140007.dosage_hint: Cod Liver Oil with Vitamins A and D per 5mL
4800016140007.purpose_en: Nutritional supplement providing Vitamins A and D for bone health, vision, and immune function.
4800016140007.purpose_fil: Supplement ng nutrisyon na nagbibigay ng Vitamins A at D para sa kalusugan ng buto, paningin, at immune system.
4800016140007.precautions_en: Do not exceed recommended dose. Vitamin A and D can accumulate to toxic levels.
4800016140007.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa inirekomendang dosis. Ang Vitamin A at D ay maaaring maakumula sa nakalason na antas.
4800016140007.frequency_hint: Adults: 15mL twice daily. Children: as directed on label.

4800016150006.purpose_en: NSAID for mild to moderate pain relief including dysmenorrhea, dental pain, and headache.
4800016150006.purpose_fil: NSAID para sa banayad hanggang katamtamang sakit kabilang ang dysmenorrhea, sakit ng ngipin, at sakit ng ulo.
4800016150006.precautions_en: Take with food. Do not use for more than 7 days. Avoid if allergic to NSAIDs.
4800016150006.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Huwag gamitin ng higit sa 7 araw. Iwasan kung allergic sa NSAIDs.

4800016160005.purpose_en: NSAID analgesic for short-term relief of pain and inflammation.
4800016160005.purpose_fil: NSAID para sa panandaliang pampawala ng sakit at pamamaga.
4800016160005.precautions_en: Take with food or milk. Not for long-term use. Avoid in kidney or liver disease.
4800016160005.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain o gatas. Hindi para sa matagalang paggamit. Iwasan sa sakit ng bato o atay.
4800016160005.frequency_hint: 500mg every 8 hours as needed, with food.

4800016170004.purpose_en: Combination analgesic for fast relief of headache, migraine, and dental pain.
4800016170004.purpose_fil: Kombinasyon ng analgesic para sa mabilis na pampawala ng sakit ng ulo, migraine, at sakit ng ngipin.
4800016170004.precautions_en: Not recommended for children under 12. Avoid excessive use due to caffeine content.
4800016170004.precautions_fil: Hindi inirerekomenda para sa mga batang wala pang 12 taon. Iwasan ang labis na paggamit dahil sa caffeine.
4800016170004.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Max 6 tablets per day.

4800016180003.purpose_en: NSAID for pain, fever, and inflammation including menstrual cramps.
4800016180003.purpose_fil: NSAID para sa sakit, lagnat, at pamamaga kabilang ang menstrual cramps.
4800016180003.precautions_en: Take with food. Avoid in stomach ulcers. Not recommended during last trimester of pregnancy.
4800016180003.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Iwasan sa ulcer sa sikmura. Hindi inirerekomenda sa huling trimester ng pagbubuntis.
4800016180003.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 tablets every 8 to 12 hours as needed.

4800016190002.purpose_en: Antibiotic combination for infections including middle ear infection, sinusitis, and skin infections.
4800016190002.purpose_fil: Kombinasyon ng antibiotic para sa impeksyon kabilang ang gitnang tenga, sinusitis, at balat.
4800016190002.precautions_en: Take with meals. Complete the full prescribed course. Inform doctor of penicillin allergy.
4800016190002.precautions_fil: Inumin kasabay ng pagkain. Tapusin ang buong kurso. Sabihin sa doktor ang allergy sa penicillin.
4800016190002.frequency_hint: 1 tablet 3 times daily (every 8 hours), or as prescribed.

4800016200008.purpose_en: Calcium channel blocker for hypertension and angina.
4800016200008.purpose_fil: Calcium channel blocker para sa mataas na presyon ng dugo at angina.
4800016200008.precautions_en: May cause flushing, headache, and edema. Do not crush extended-release forms. Avoid grapefruit.
4800016200008.precautions_fil: Maaaring magdulot ng pamumula, sakit ng ulo, at pamamaga. Huwag durugin ang extended-release na anyo. Iwasan ang grapefruit.

4800016210007.purpose_en: ARB antihypertensive for high blood pressure and heart failure.
4800016210007.purpose_fil: ARB antihypertensive para sa mataas na presyon ng dugo at heart failure.
4800016210007.precautions_en: Do NOT take if pregnant. Monitor blood pressure and kidney function. May cause dizziness.
4800016210007.precautions_fil: HUWAG uminom kung buntis. Subaybayan ang presyon ng dugo at kidney function. Maaaring magdulot ng hilo.
4800016210007.frequency_hint: 80mg once daily, titrated to 160mg as tolerated.

4800016220006.purpose_en: Long-acting basal insulin for Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes.
4800016220006.purpose_fil: Long-acting na insulin para sa Type 1 at Type 2 na diyabetes.
4800016220006.precautions_en: Do not dilute or mix with other insulins. Rotate injection sites. Monitor blood glucose regularly. Risk of hypoglycemia.
4800016220006.precautions_fil: Huwag i-dilute o ihalo sa ibang insulin. Palitan ang lugar ng injection. Regular na subaybayan ang glucose. Panganib ng mababang asukal sa dugo.
4800016220006.frequency_hint: Inject subcutaneously once daily at the same time each day, as prescribed.

4800016230005.purpose_en: Xanthine oxidase inhibitor for gout and high uric acid levels.
4800016230005.purpose_fil: Para sa gout at mataas na antas ng uric acid sa dugo.
4800016230005.precautions_en: Drink plenty of water (2L+ daily). Do not use during acute gout attack. Stevens-Johnson syndrome risk — stop if rash occurs.
4800016230005.precautions_fil: Uminom ng maraming tubig (2L+ bawat araw). Huwag gamitin sa panahon ng acute gout attack. Tigilan agad kung may rash.

4800016240004.purpose_en: For treatment and prevention of acute gout attacks.
4800016240004.purpose_fil: Para sa paggamot at pag-iwas ng acute gout attacks.
4800016240004.precautions_en: Do not exceed maximum dose. May cause diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting. Use with caution in kidney/liver disease.
4800016240004.precautions_fil: Huwag lumampas sa maximum na dosis. Maaaring magdulot ng pagtatae, pagduduwal, at pagsusuka.
4800016240004.frequency_hint: 0.5mg to 1mg initially, then 0.5mg every 2 to 3 hours until relief, or as prescribed.

4800016250003.purpose_en: Beta-blocker for hypertension, angina, irregular heart rhythm, and migraine prevention.
4800016250003.purpose_fil: Beta-blocker para sa mataas na presyon, angina, hindi regular na tibok ng puso, at pag-iwas ng migraine.
4800016250003.precautions_en: Do not stop suddenly — risk of rebound angina/heart attack. Avoid in asthma patients. Monitor pulse.
4800016250003.precautions_fil: Huwag biglang itigil — panganib ng rebound angina/atake sa puso. Iwasan sa mga may hika. Subaybayan ang pulso.
4800016250003.frequency_hint: 40mg 2 to 3 times daily, or as prescribed.

4800016260002.purpose_en: Corticosteroid for severe allergic reactions, inflammation, and autoimmune conditions.
4800016260002.purpose_fil: Corticosteroid para sa matinding allergic reaction, pamamaga, at autoimmune na kondisyon.
4800016260002.precautions_en: Use only as prescribed. Do not stop abruptly after long-term use. May raise blood sugar and blood pressure.
4800016260002.precautions_fil: Gamitin lamang ayon sa reseta. Huwag biglang itigil pagkatapos ng matagalang paggamit. Maaaring magtaas ng asukal at presyon.
4800016260002.frequency_hint: As prescribed by your doctor. Dosage varies greatly by condition.

4800016270001.purpose_en: Centrally-acting opioid analgesic for moderate to severe pain. Requires prescription.
4800016270001.purpose_fil: Opioid analgesic para sa katamtaman hanggang matinding sakit. Kailangan ng reseta.
4800016270001.precautions_en: Risk of dependence. Do not drive. Avoid alcohol. Do not use with other opioids, MAO inhibitors, or sedatives without medical supervision.
4800016270001.precautions_fil: Panganib ng pagkagumon. Huwag magmaneho. Iwasan ang alak. Huwag gamitin kasabay ng ibang opioids o sedatives nang walang medikal na supervision.
4800016270001.frequency_hint: 50mg to 100mg every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Max 400mg daily.

4800016280000.purpose_en: Benzodiazepine for anxiety, muscle spasm, seizure, and alcohol withdrawal. Controlled substance.
4800016280000.purpose_fil: Benzodiazepine para sa pagkabalisa, spasm ng kalamnan, seizure, at alcohol withdrawal. Kinokontrol na sustansya.
4800016280000.precautions_en: High potential for dependence. Do not drive or operate machinery. Avoid alcohol. Requires prescription.
4800016280000.precautions_fil: Mataas na panganib ng pagkagumon. Huwag magmaneho o gumamit ng makinarya. Iwasan ang alak. Kailangan ng reseta.
4800016280000.frequency_hint: As prescribed by your doctor only. Never self-medicate with benzodiazepines.

4800016290009.dosage_hint: Iron + Vitamin C + B Vitamins per capsule
4800016290009.purpose_en: Iron and multivitamin supplement for iron-deficiency anemia.
4800016290009.purpose_fil: Supplement na iron at multivitamin para sa iron-deficiency anemia.
4800016290009.precautions_en: May cause dark stools and mild constipation. Take with food. Separate from antacids by 2 hours.
4800016290009.precautions_fil: Maaaring magpaitim ng dumi at magdulot ng banayad na constipation. Inumin kasabay ng pagkain.
4800016290009.frequency_hint: 1 capsule once daily, or as prescribed.

4800016300002.dosage_hint: B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B9, B12 combination per tablet
4800016300002.purpose_en: B vitamin supplement for nerve health, energy metabolism, and nutritional support.
4800016300002.purpose_fil: B vitamin supplement para sa kalusugan ng nerves, metabolismo ng enerhiya, at suporta sa nutrisyon.
4800016300002.precautions_en: Generally well-tolerated. Urine may turn bright yellow due to riboflavin — this is normal.
4800016300002.precautions_fil: Karaniwang hindi nagdudulot ng problema. Maaaring maging maliwanag na dilaw ang ihi dahil sa riboflavin — normal ito.

4800016310001.purpose_en: Vitamin B12 supplement for nerve health, anemia, and B12 deficiency.
4800016310001.purpose_fil: Supplement ng Vitamin B12 para sa kalusugan ng nerves, anemia, at kakulangan ng B12.
4800016310001.precautions_en: Safe for most people. High doses are generally excreted in urine. Consult a doctor for injections.
4800016310001.precautions_fil: Ligtas para sa karamihan. Ang mataas na dosis ay karaniwang iniiwan sa ihi. Kumonsulta sa doktor para sa mga injection.
4800016310001.frequency_hint: 500mcg to 1000mcg once daily, or as prescribed.

4800016320000.purpose_en: Antibiotic eye drops for bacterial conjunctivitis and other eye infections.
4800016320000.purpose_fil: Antibiotic eye drops para sa bacterial conjunctivitis at iba pang impeksyon ng mata.
4800016320000.precautions_en: For eye use only. Wash hands before use. Do not touch dropper tip to eye. Discard 4 weeks after opening.
4800016320000.precautions_fil: Para sa mata lamang. Hugasan ang mga kamay bago gamitin. Huwag itapat ang dropper sa mata. Itapon 4 linggo pagkatapos buksan.
4800016320000.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 drops every 2 to 6 hours, or as directed by your doctor.

4800016330009.purpose_en: Antibiotic eye drops for bacterial eye infections.
4800016330009.purpose_fil: Antibiotic eye drops para sa bacterial na impeksyon ng mata.
4800016330009.precautions_en: For eye use only. Remove contact lenses before use. Wash hands before and after.
4800016330009.precautions_fil: Para sa mata lamang. Alisin ang contact lens bago gamitin. Hugasan ang mga kamay bago at pagkatapos.
4800016330009.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 drops every 4 hours, or as prescribed.

4800016340008.purpose_en: Nasal decongestant spray for relief of nasal congestion due to cold or allergies.
4800016340008.purpose_fil: Nasal decongestant spray para sa pampawala ng baradong ilong dahil sa sipon o allergy.
4800016340008.precautions_en: Do not use for more than 3 to 5 days — risk of rebound congestion. Do not use in children under 6 (use lower strength).
4800016340008.precautions_fil: Huwag gamitin ng mahigit 3 hanggang 5 araw — panganib ng rebound congestion. Huwag gamitin sa mga batang wala pang 6 taon.
4800016340008.frequency_hint: 1 to 2 sprays per nostril every 8 to 10 hours as needed.
